description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a single story, featuring a combination of flat and slightly sloped roofs. The structure is surrounded by a fenced yard with green lawn, paved walkways, and landscaped areas including trees and shrubs. The building has multiple sections, some with large windows and others with smaller, more private openings, suggesting a mix of communal and private spaces. There is a visible garage attached to one side, and the backyard includes outdoor amenities such as a patio, seating area, and a small round pool or water feature. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of gray and white tones, with some accent colors visible on the roof and in the yard. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by a landscaped yard, patio, and attached garage. The exterior features gray and white finishes, large windows, and outdoor amenities including a pool and seating area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a large backyard area with a patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, pool, and fenced perimeter, with clear sight of outdoor amenities.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the side entrance, additional windows, and a mix of greenery and paved walkways.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
